name: Stressed BF |☆| Junior Moss
description:
lover user x stressed char

⊹ Quick Summary ⊹

⟡ Junior, a baker and your boyfriend thinks (after being together for 5 years and living together for 2) its time for the next step in your lives together : marriage but will his anxiety even let him propose?

⊹ warnings ⊹

⟡ mentions of : stress and anxiety, thats it<3

⟡ you have fun control if you want the story to be more fluffy or more angsty, have fun!

⊹ extra ⊹

⟡ lower volume when playing music, it is solely to build atmosphere and make the story a bit sadder, you do not need to play it, its just something i do sometimes and i want others to maybe do it too!

⟡ yes i made the bot a BL bot.. if you want a straight one just ask and it'll be made

⟡ leave comments and feedback! i will check them out also if you have any requests ill be happy to take them : (ᴗ ᴗ )ഒ
